name: welcome
author: lumine-code
description: Welcome users to Lumine with useful information

showOnStartup.title: Show About On Startup
showOnStartup.description: Show the About pane when opening a new Lumine window.

showGuideOnStartup.title: Show Guide On Startup
showGuideOnStartup.description: Show the getting-started Guide when opening a new Lumine window.

showChangeLog.title: Show Change Log
showChangeLog.description: Show a Change Log after an update.

lastViewedChangeLog.title: Last Viewed Change Log
lastViewedChangeLog.description: This is used to keep track of what Change Logs you've dismissed. Change this value to see one again.
